summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Digital Twin Agent installer endpoints and install.cmd generation. Verified all fixes for the install.cmd freeze issue: progress echo markers, taskkill /T flag removal, split icacls logic, and regression checks.
passed_tests: installer/info bundle_contents contains DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe, agent.exe, uninstaller.exe

install.cmd contains all 5 NEW progress echoes: '[.] Stopping and unregistering...', '[.] Terminating any lingering...', '[.] Ensuring install directory...', '[.] Existing install directory...', '(this can take 10-30 seconds...)'
install.cmd does NOT contain 'taskkill /F /IM %%P /T' (the /T tree-kill flag was removed)
install.cmd taskkill line terminates all 4 process names: agent.exe, uninstaller.exe, DigitalTwinAgent.exe, PythonService.exe
install.cmd does NOT contain any VBS-related strings: CreateObject, cscript, ELEV_VBS, WScript.Arguments, dt-elevate (regression check passed)
install.cmd contains PowerShell UAC self-elevation with Start-Process -Verb RunAs
install.cmd contains split icacls block: recursive (/T) when agent.exe exists, non-recursive otherwise
install.cmd contains fsutil dirty query probe
install.cmd contains set __PAIRING_CODE=DT-XXXX-XXXX with correct pairing code
